name: Travel Planner Agent
description: A multi-agent travel planner that creates complete trip plans including flights, hotels and budget estimates.

skills.name: Flight Search
skills.description: Searches and suggests flight routes with estimated prices
examples: Find flights from Dublin to Goa
What are the cheapest flights to Goa in August?

skills.name: Hotel Search
skills.description: Suggests hotels based on location and budget
examples: What are the best hotels in Calangute?

skills.name: Travel Planning
skills.description: Creates complete travel plans with flights, hotels and budget summary
examples: Plan a 2-day trip to Goa for 2 adults
Create a budget travel plan for Goa

skills.name: Security Validation
skills.description: Validates and sanitizes all inputs to prevent prompt injection attacks
